title: Drawer Navigator
description: Implement a side drawer for navigation.

slides.title: What is a Drawer? 🗄️
slides.content:
# Side Menu

A drawer navigator presents a menu that slides from the left (or right) side of the screen. Common in apps like Gmail.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @react-navigation/drawer
npx expo install react-native-gesture-handler react-native-reanimated
```

⚠️ React Native Reanimated requires additional configuration (usually handled automatically in Expo).

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content: You can nest a stack inside a drawer (or tabs) to have both a side menu and a stack for each section. This is a very common pattern.
